disclaimer: Pilot data for governance review support only. Not legal advice. Not a compliance guarantee. Not complete global coverage. Sample records require human review before client use. Official sources control.
scoring_note: regulation_maturity_score and activity_score are tracker metadata indices from pilot seeds — not legal certainty.

items.status_summary: Pilot tracks Australian government AI ethics and industry AI pages in the source registry. Seed does not assert a single comprehensive federal AI statute.
items.legal_safe_note: T048 manual seed. Not legal advice. Verify on official sources before relying on summaries.
items.comparison_summary: Australia: Guidance — standards-led approach (guidance); 1 tracker update(s); maturity index 54/100 from pilot metadata — not legal advice.
